meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenarios.trigger: Need animated video explaining a technical concept.
scenarios.orientation: Turn abstract terms into visible objects, animate relationships, then show the consequence.

scenarios.trigger: Need to convert code architecture into an animation.
scenarios.orientation: Build reusable visual components for modules, data flow, state, and failure points.

scenarios.trigger: Agent generated a Motion Canvas script that looks messy.
scenarios.orientation: Refactor into named beats, reusable components, and explicit pauses.
